“The living God can give much operational revelation to the living Church just as he is doing in the true and living Church today. We read of how, during a strife-filled period of time around 12 B.C., leaders and some of their brethren ‘who knew concerning the true points of doctrine’ were ‘having many revelations daily, therefore they did preach unto the people, insomuch that they did put an end…

On the 1st of March he reached his eighty-fifth year, and his wife Emma her fifty-fourth. That day was selected for the dedicataion of the new home, an event to which he looked forward with a large measure of satisfaction.
